note: sost-cli now sends and decrypts sealed Capsules (Fase Sealed-1.D). New flag --recipient-pubkey <66-hex>. Modes wired in the cli: sealed-note, sealed-structured, sealed-doc-ref. Same gates as the wallet: chain height >= V13_HEIGHT (12000), single recipient, recipient pubkey supplied, hash160(pubkey) == recipient address, plaintext within per-mode caps, envelope ≤ 243 B, total payload ≤ 255 B. New subcommand: sost-cli capsule-decrypt <txid> [--wallet ...] — fetches the TX over RPC, finds outputs with sealed payload (type 0x02 / 0x04 / 0x06), tries every wallet key against each envelope, prints recovered plaintext or 'Encrypted Capsule — not decryptable by this wallet'. Sealed Document Reference is now full-cycle: --capsule-mode sealed-doc-ref --capsule-file <path> --capsule-locator <ipfs://…|https://…>. Backend tests up to 130/0 (29 envelope + 51 packaging + 38 wallet-attach + 12 cross-language vectors). NO consensus, NO RPC schema, NO transaction wire format, NO sighash, NO node, NO miner. Web wallet unchanged from v179.
